data.body: e165 CLOSED (completion-verifier passed after strengthening the AC3 test: now injects a hand-crafted KEY_ADD with backdated timestamp=1 that folds LAST -> added_epoch==2, proving fold-order governs not timestamp; verifier caught the original test only checked counter advance). Amended e165 commit d88a54d12. 5 of 8 leaves closed (ddbe/4e9d/bde5/e165 + docs pending). Pushing amended e165.
